title: Amethyst
description: A lean but powerful modpack built on Adrenaline.
body:
![Amethyst](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QKTwwCl2/images/d375bc12be408afbbc4813e4d4a93982d6808f40.png)
## Welcome to *Amethyst*!
![Built on Adrenaline](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/built-with/adrenaline_64h.png?raw=true)\
Just a really lean modpack that still has the preformance of a fabric modpack, with all the doodads you would ever need for your next 2-week minecraft phase.

Highlight Features Include:
> Dark mode! 🌙\
> QOL Features! 🎮\
> A Minimap! 🗺️\
> Blazing Fast Preformance! ⚡\
> Under 50 mods! 🤏

And so much more!
